zh.Grove, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾葛洛夫
zh.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Arques是Lord Gilbert IV de l'Arches of Grove and Weston的女兒，於1179年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾葛洛夫。她於1199年與William Ruffus III在英國諾廷加姆爾葛洛夫結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1195年在她的家鄉享年16歲。

zh-hans.Grove, Nottinghamshire, England: 英国諾廷加姆爾葛洛夫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Arques是Lord Gilbert IV de l'Arches of Grove and Weston的女儿，于1179年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾葛洛夫。她于1199年与William Ruffus III在英国諾廷加姆爾葛洛夫结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1195年在她的家乡享年16岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Arques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Luis, Fernando, Jorge, Armando, Ana, Joaquin, Julio, Marcos.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Henrique, Lourenco, Seraphine, Vasco.

Catalan (Marquès); Spanish and southern French (Marqués): from Catalan marquès, Spanish and Occitan marqués ‘marquis’, words of French origin (see Marquis ), applied either as a nickname for someone who behaved like a marquis or as an occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Marcos  .

variants.name: Marquis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Normand, Marcel, Fernand, Lucien, Rosaire, Andre, Armand, Camille, Cecile, Jacques, Francois.

French: from the title marquis ‘marquess’, applied as an ironic nickname to someone who behaved like a marquis or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis. The title, derived from an ancient Germanic word meaning ‘boundary’ (compare March ), originally referred to the governor of a border territory. Marquises did not form part of the original French feudal structure of nobility; the title was first adopted by the Counts of Toulouse because of their possessions in the border region beyond the Rhône. Compare Markee and Markey .

English: nickname from Middle English markis ‘marquis, marquess, nobleman’ (Old French marchis); see also 1 above. The word is also found as a female personal name which may also be origin of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Arques was born in 1179, in Grove, Nottinghamshire, England as the daughter of Lord Gilbert IV de l'Arches of Grove and Weston. She married William Ruffus III in 1199, in Grove, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1195, in her hometown, at the age of 16.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Arques est née en 1179, à Grove, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, fille de Lord Gilbert IV de l'Arches of Grove and Weston. Elle a épousé William Ruffus III en 1199, à Grove, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1195, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 16 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Arques wurde 1179 in Grove, Nottinghamshire, England, als Tochter von Lord Gilbert IV de l'Arches of Grove and Weston geboren. Sie hat 1199 in Grove, Nottinghamshire, England William Ruffus III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1195 im Alter von 16 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Arques è nata il nel 1179 nel Grove, Nottinghamshire, England come figlia di Lord Gilbert IV de l'Arches of Grove and Weston. Lei sposato William Ruffus III nel 1199, nel Grove, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1195, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 16 anni.

ja.Grove, Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアグローブ
ja.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Arquesは1179年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアグローブでLord Gilbert IV de l'Arches of Grove and Westonの娘として生まれた。1199年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアグローブでWilliam Ruffus IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1195年に故郷で16歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Arques(은)는 1179년 영국 노틴그함실르 그로브에서 Lord Gilbert IV de l'Arches of Grove and Weston의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1199년 영국 노틴그함실르 그로브에서 William Ruffus III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1195년 그녀의 고향에서 16세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Arques nasceu em 1179, em Grove, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra filha de Lord Gilbert IV de l'Arches of Grove and Weston. Ela casou-se com William Ruffus III em 1199, em Grove, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1195, em sua cidade natal, com 16 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Arques родилась в 1179 г. в местности гров, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Её отца звали Lord Gilbert IV de l'Arches of Grove and Weston. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Ruffus III в 1199 г. в местности гров, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1195 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 16 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Arques nació en 1179, en Grove, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra como hija de Lord Gilbert IV de l'Arches of Grove and Weston. Se casó con William Ruffus III en 1199, en Grove, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1195, en su pueblo, a la edad de 16 años.

th.Grove, Nottinghamshire, England: กโรฟว์, โนฒิงามชิเร, เอิงแลนด์
